entries.description: Created tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/utils/cancelLifecycle.ts with isCancelled, wasRestored, cancelSessionSet, restoreSessionSet helpers, atomic write, and session-state.json plumbing (preCancelStatus capture/restore).
Created ai-router/session_lifecycle.py mirroring the TS module byte-for-byte: same header, same ISO-8601 timestamp shape, same prepend semantics, same state-file plumbing.

Updated ai-router/__init__.py print_session_set_status to bucket cancelled sets via is_cancelled(), render with [!] glyph, sort to bottom, and conditionally render the [!] legend column only when at least one cancelled set exists.
Created src/test/suite/cancelLifecycle.test.ts with 15 tests covering predicates, file-shape, multi-cycle accumulation, and session-state.json plumbing.
Created ai-router/tests/test_session_lifecycle.py with 16 tests mirroring the TS suite plus an LF-only line-ending check for cross-platform parity.
Python: 663 passed (16 new). TS unit suite: cancelLifecycle 15 + metrics 7 = 22 passing. tsc --noEmit clean.
Extended SessionState union in tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/types.ts to include the cancelled state.

Updated readSessionSets in src/utils/fileSystem.ts: CANCELLED.md presence is the highest-precedence state signal (beats status=complete and change-log presence). Belt-and-suspenders branch maps status=cancelled (without markdown) to the cancelled tree state. Updated STATE_RANK to include cancelled (lowest, so the active copy wins in cross-root merge).

Updated SessionSetsProvider.ts: added cancelled to ICON_FILES, emit Cancelled group only when ≥1 cancelled set exists, sort cancelled by lastTouched, contextValue=sessionSet:cancelled flows through unchanged.
Added media/cancelled.svg — muted-grey circle with white X glyph. Visually distinct from done.svg (green check) per the spec.

Created src/commands/cancelLifecycleCommands.ts implementing dabblerSessionSets.cancel and dabblerSessionSets.restore with confirmation modals (Cancel Set/Keep, Restore/Keep Cancelled), optional showInputBox reasons, error toast on failure, and tree refresh after success. Registered in extension.ts.

Declared cancel and restore commands in package.json with view/item/context entries: Cancel visible on sessionSet:(in-progress|not-started|done); Restore visible on sessionSet:cancelled; both grouped at 9_lifecycle@1/@2.

Created src/test/suite/cancelTreeView.test.ts (13 tests) covering: file-presence to state mapping (CANCELLED.md > status=complete; status=cancelled standalone; RESTORED.md does not), Cancelled group hidden when empty / shown when populated / contextValue contract, cancel/restore round-trip across not-started/in-progress/done initial states. Created src/test/vscode-stub.js so vscode-importing tests can run without the electron harness.

TS unit suite: 58 passed (16 cancelLifecycle + 13 cancelTreeView + 7 metrics + 7 modeBadge/outsourceMode + 15 fileSystem). tsc --noEmit clean. esbuild compile clean. Full electron harness (npm test) is not runnable on this Windows host (Code.exe rejects test-electron sandbox flags); standalone mocha run with vscode-stub.js exercises the same assertion paths.
End-of-session cross-provider verification via gpt-5-4 ($0.0848). Saved raw output to session-002.md.
End-of-session cross-provider verification round 2 via gpt-5-4 ($0.1662). Saved raw output to session-002.md.

Round 2 verifier flagged a Major spec deviation: readSessionSets had a belt-and-suspenders branch mapping status=cancelled (no CANCELLED.md) to the cancelled tree state, exceeding the spec detection rules. ACCEPTED. Removed the branch from src/utils/fileSystem.ts and inverted the corresponding test in src/test/suite/cancelTreeView.test.ts. 58 tests still pass; tsc clean. Round 3 deliberately skipped — Round 2 named the fix path verbatim and the change is a 5+4 line removal/inversion with no new information possible from re-routing.
